title.pt: Controle de acesso: autenticação vs. autorização
title.es: Control de acceso: autenticación vs. autorización
title.it: Controllo degli accessi: autenticazione vs. autorizzazione

instructions.en: Implement the `requireRole(role)` middleware factory that checks `req.user.role` and calls `next()` if it matches, or responds with 403 Forbidden if not. Use it to protect admin-only routes.
instructions.pt: Implemente a factory de middleware `requireRole(role)` que verifica `req.user.role` e chama `next()` se corresponder, ou responde com 403 Forbidden se não. Use-a para proteger rotas exclusivas de administrador.
instructions.es: Implementa la factory de middleware `requireRole(role)` que verifique `req.user.role` y llame a `next()` si coincide, o responda con 403 Forbidden si no. Úsala para proteger rutas exclusivas de administrador.
instructions.de: Implementiere die Middleware-Factory `requireRole(role)`, die `req.user.role` prüft und `next()` aufruft, wenn es übereinstimmt, oder mit 403 Forbidden antwortet, wenn nicht. Verwende sie, um Admin-Only-Routen zu schützen.
instructions.it: Implementa la factory di middleware `requireRole(role)` che controlla `req.user.role` e chiama `next()` se corrisponde, oppure risponde con 403 Forbidden in caso contrario. Usala per proteggere le rotte solo per amministratori.
instructions.fr: Implémente la factory de middleware `requireRole(role)` qui vérifie `req.user.role` et appelle `next()` si ça correspond, ou répond avec 403 Forbidden sinon. Utilise-la pour protéger les routes réservées aux administrateurs.

tests: const req = { session: {} }; const res = { status(code) { this.statusCode = code; return this; }, json(body) { this.body = body; return this; } }; requireAuth(req, res, () => {}); expect(res.statusCode).toBe(401);
const req2 = { session: { user: 'alice' } }; let nextCalled = false; requireAuth(req2, {}, () => { nextCalled = true; }); expect(nextCalled).toBe(true);
